message:
refactor(runtime): improve scheduler robustness and blocking pool management

Enhance runtime scheduler and blocking pool with better task lifecycle
management and worker coordination.

Scheduler changes (three_lane.rs, worker.rs):
- Improve task priority queue handling for more predictable scheduling
- Better worker shutdown coordination during runtime drop
- Enhanced metrics collection for scheduler diagnostics

Blocking pool improvements (spawn_blocking.rs):
- Improved thread pool sizing heuristics
- Better work-stealing between blocking threads
- Enhanced cancellation propagation from scope to blocking tasks

Runtime state (state.rs):
- Cleaner state machine transitions
- Better handling of concurrent shutdown requests
- Improved debug assertions for state invariants

Builder (builder.rs):
- Configuration validation improvements
- Better defaults documentation

Lab runtime (lab/runtime.rs):
- Minor fix for test compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
